# NodeAttribute.InlineFormula property

The node's own formula source text (read at specifier `+24` offset / `+28` size, payload-relative) when [`FormulaGbid`](./FormulaGbid.md) is `0xFFFFFFFF`; otherwise empty.

public string InlineFormula { get; set; }
